name: No-Cook Tofu "Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
2 lbs Firm Tofu
3/4 cup Honey
1 teaspoon Vanilla (or 1/2 teaspoon if using Watkins brand)
1/4 teaspoon Cinnamon (optional)
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1 1/2 cups Sliced fruit of your choice
Grape nuts cereal works well in the crust. Alternatively, use a granola-type cereal from a natural food store, ensuring it is low in fat.
Crust: Process cereal or granola with a metal blade until coarsely ground. Mix with apple juice concentrate and press into a 9-inch pie plate. Set aside.
Filling: Mash tofu and honey together. Add vanilla and cinnamon if desired. Beat the mixture until fluffy. Spoon over the crust and smooth the top. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and refrigerate until serving time (the longer it chills, the firmer and more flavorful it will be).
Topping: Just before serving, arrange sliced fruit over the cheesecake. Serves 8 to 10. Per serving: 306 calories; 12g protein; 4g fat; 62g carbohydrates; 0 cholesterol; 322mg sodium.
